description: CompositionSleeveless purple top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, braid detail along the neckline, floral tie-ups at the shoulder that can be knotted into a bowFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separately in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Use mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printjealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe.
